mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, p.pr_id AS prId, c.content AS content, c.comment_type AS commentType, c.depth AS depth, c.image_name AS imageName, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM comment c JOIN pr p ON c.pr_id = p.pr_id JOIN repository r ON p.repo_id = r.repo_id WHERE r.repo_id = #{repoId} AND p.pr_id = #{prId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (pr_id, content, comment_type, depth, image_name, created_at) VALUES (#{prId}, #{content}, #{commentType}, #{depth}, #{imageName}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment WHERE pr_id = #{prId} AND comment_id = #{commentId}
